summary: Phase 2A validated end-to-end. Backend: GET /api/settings default+persisted, PUT /api/settings roundtrip returns identical values with updated_at, GET /api/countries/RU returns row, GET /api/countries/ZZ returns 404. Frontend: Countries page loads with map+list+search (russia -> 1 result), country-detail-RU opens with events+commodities panels, close button clears selection. Predictions page renders all 6 cards (xau/xag/wti/ng/zw/zc) with 6 ProbabilityGauge components and 6 correlation rows. News page filters by impact (all=10 -> high=4) and by search 'gold' (=1). Settings page: watchlist toggles present for XAU/XAG/WTI/NG/ZW/ZC, slider changed 80->83, save-settings shows saved-indicator, page reload confirms 83 persisted via SQLite. Dashboard regression OK (Meridian command room renders map + live wire feed).
passed: Countries page: map + list + search filter (russia -> 1)
Countries drill-down: country-detail-RU with events + commodities, close clears selection
Predictions page: 6 prediction cards + 6 probability gauges + 6 correlation rows
News page: impact-high filter (10 -> 4) and gold search (-> 1)
Settings save flow: toggle + slider change -> saved-indicator visible
Settings persistence: threshold value survives full page reload (SQLite roundtrip)
Dashboard regression: root page still renders
notes: Commodities detail page intentionally still ComingSoon in Phase 2A per spec — not tested. All mock data endpoints returned jittered but schema-valid responses.
